channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Confessions of an AI lab rat
item.description: Axios CEO Jim VandeHei writes about spending the past year using AI obsessively, inputting personal and business data and turning himself into a test subject.

item.title: California's slow vote count fuels MAGA fraud claims
item.description: California's lengthy mail-in ballot tally is being used by President Trump to question the November election's legitimacy.

item.title: White House preemptively blames Europe for World Cup Ebola risk
item.description: The Trump administration is pressuring Europe over potential Ebola spread during the World Cup, citing travel concerns.

item.title: Americans' moral views show puritanical shift
item.description: Gallup data shows fewer Americans now view birth control, out-of-wedlock births, and gambling as morally acceptable.
